Off Calendar May-25-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Jeremy D. Huie, Esq., of BASSI EDLIN HUIE & BLUM (415-403-4429), appearing for defendant / moving party Kaiser Ventures LLC
Stephen Tigerman, Esq., of HAROWITZ & TIGERMAN, LLP (415-788-1588) for plaintiff / opposing party James Robert Soprito

RULING:
DEFENDANT KAISER VENTURES LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR ADJUDICATION

Argued and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Kaiser Ventures LLC's motion for summary judgment is denied and its alternate motion for summary adjudication on the issue of punitive damages is granted. On the issue of duty, defendant did not present any evidence on its actual knowledge and thus failed to satisfy its burden of production. One the issue of punitive damages, defendant satisfied its burden of production and plaintiffs did not present evidence creating a triable issue whether defendant acted with malice, fraud or oppression by clear and convincing evidence. Each side is to submit an order for the Court's signature. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 = (220/HEK)
